title: Navigate from landing page to Features via header navigation
description: Verifies the header 'Features' link loads the Features overview page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on "Features" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-features.html"
Verify page title contains "Features"

title: Navigate from landing page to Pricing via header navigation
description: Verifies the header 'Pricing' link loads the Pricing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on "Pricing" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-pricing.html"
Verify page title contains "Pricing"

title: Navigate from landing page to Demo via header navigation
description: Verifies the header 'Demo' link loads the Demo page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on "Demo" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-demo.html"
Verify page title contains "Demo"

title: Launch the in-browser app from the Demo page using Open App/Launch App
description: Verifies the Demo page provides a link/button to open the main DeadlineOS app and it loads successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on "Demo" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-demo.html"
Click on "Open App" or "Launch App"
Verify URL contains "/deadlineos-v3.html"
Verify text "DeadlineOS" is visible

title: Handle missing page navigation by showing the 404 page
description: Verifies clicking a header navigation link that points to a missing page results in the 404 page loading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on the header navigation link that points to a missing page
Verify URL contains "/404.html"
Verify text "404" is visible

title: Navigate to Roadmap page from landing page header (if present)
description: Verifies the header 'Roadmap' link loads the Roadmap page when available in the header navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on "Roadmap" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-roadmap.html"
Verify page title contains "Roadmap"

title: Navigate to Compare page from landing page header (if present)
description: Verifies the header 'Compare' link loads the Compare page when available in the header navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "header navigation" is visible
Click on "Compare" in the header navigation
Verify URL contains "/dos-compare.html"
Verify page title contains "Compare"

title: Navigate to Privacy Policy page from landing page (typically footer link)
description: Verifies the Privacy policy page is reachable from the landing site navigation (commonly via footer).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify element "Privacy" is visible
Click on "Privacy"
Verify URL contains "/privacy.html"
Verify page title contains "Privacy"

title: Create a new PIN-protected profile and log in successfully
description: Verifies a user can create a local profile with a PIN and then log into that profile to reach the app dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click "Create Profile"
Type "Test Profile 1" into the profile name field
Type "1234" into the PIN field
Click "Save"
Verify text "Profile created" is visible
Click on the "Test Profile 1" profile in the profile list
Verify element "PIN" input field is visible

title: Validation: profile name is required
description: Verifies the app shows a validation error and does not create a profile when the profile name is blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click "Create Profile"
Scroll to the profile name field
Click "Save"
Verify text "Profile name" is visible
Verify text "required" is visible

title: Create a task with deadline and priority, then edit priority, complete, and delete it
description: Verifies the full happy path for creating, updating, completing, and deleting a task in the tasks list.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Full lifecycle" into the task title input field
Select a valid future date in the task deadline control
Select "High" in the task priority control
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify text "E2E Task - Full lifecycle" is visible in the tasks list
Click the priority control on the task "E2E Task - Full lifecycle"
Select "Low" in the task priority control for that task
Verify the task "E2E Task - Full lifecycle" shows priority "Low"
Click the complete checkbox for the task "E2E Task - Full lifecycle"
Verify the task "E2E Task - Full lifecycle" is visually marked as done
Click the delete button for the task "E2E Task - Full lifecycle"
Click "Confirm" in the delete confirmation
Verify text "E2E Task - Full lifecycle" is not visible in the tasks list

title: Prevent adding a task when title is empty
description: Verifies validation prevents creating a task with an empty title and shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify a visible validation error message is shown for the task title
Verify no new task row appears in the tasks list

title: Persist tasks to localStorage after page reload
description: Verifies a newly added task remains visible after reloading the app page, indicating local persistence.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Persistence" into the task title input field
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify text "E2E Task - Persistence" is visible in the tasks list
Reload the page
Verify text "E2E Task - Persistence" is visible in the tasks list

title: Cancel task deletion from confirmation dialog and keep task
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation leaves the task unchanged in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Cancel delete" into the task title input field
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify text "E2E Task - Cancel delete" is visible in the tasks list
Click the delete button for the task "E2E Task - Cancel delete"
Click "Cancel" in the delete confirmation
Verify text "E2E Task - Cancel delete" is visible in the tasks list

title: Mark a task complete and verify completion persists after reload
description: Verifies completing a task updates its visible state and that completed status persists after reloading.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Completion persistence" into the task title input field
Click the "Add Task" button
Click the complete checkbox for the task "E2E Task - Completion persistence"
Verify the task "E2E Task - Completion persistence" is visually marked as done
Reload the page
Verify the task "E2E Task - Completion persistence" is visually marked as done

title: Change priority on an existing task and verify it persists after reload
description: Verifies priority changes are reflected in the UI and persist after a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Priority persistence" into the task title input field
Select "Medium" in the task priority control
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify the task "E2E Task - Priority persistence" shows priority "Medium"
Click the priority control on the task "E2E Task - Priority persistence"
Select "High" in the task priority control for that task
Verify the task "E2E Task - Priority persistence" shows priority "High"
Reload the page
Verify the task "E2E Task - Priority persistence" shows priority "High"

title: Delete a task and verify it stays deleted after reload
description: Verifies deleting a task removes it from the UI and it does not reappear after a reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click into the task title input field
Type "E2E Task - Delete persistence" into the task title input field
Click the "Add Task" button
Verify text "E2E Task - Delete persistence" is visible in the tasks list
Click the delete button for the task "E2E Task - Delete persistence"
Click "Confirm" in the delete confirmation
Verify text "E2E Task - Delete persistence" is not visible in the tasks list
Reload the page
Verify text "E2E Task - Delete persistence" is not visible in the tasks list

title: Analyze in Demo mode shows AI analysis output
description: Verifies that running Analyze in Demo mode produces visible AI analysis output in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the API key overlay
Verify text "Demo" is visible in the API key overlay
Click on the "Demo" tab in the API key overlay
Click on the overlay close button
Click on the "Analyze" button
Wait for AI processing to complete (wait for analysis output area to appear or update)
Verify an AI analysis output section is visible with non-empty content

title: AI Chat: send a message and receive an assistant reply
description: Verifies that the AI chat panel accepts a user message and displays an assistant reply in the chat history.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the AI Chat panel
Verify the chat input field is visible
Type "Summarize my current priorities in one paragraph." into the chat input field
Click on the "Send" button
Verify text "Summarize my current priorities" is visible in the chat history
Wait for an assistant reply to appear in the chat history
Verify an assistant reply message bubble is visible in the chat history

title: API key overlay: switching tabs retains expected UI elements
description: Verifies that switching between Demo and Own Key tabs updates the overlay content appropriately.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the API key overlay
Click on the "Own Key" tab in the API key overlay
Verify text "Own Key" is visible in the API key overlay
Verify an API key input field is visible
Click on the "Demo" tab in the API key overlay
Verify text "Demo" is visible in the API key overlay
Verify the Demo instructions or Demo-mode description text is visible

title: Analyze with invalid API key shows fallback response or visible error
description: Verifies that when an invalid key is saved, Analyze does not silently fail and shows either a fallback smart-mock output or a visible error message/toast.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the API key overlay
Click on the "Own Key" tab in the API key overlay
Type "invalid_key_123456" into the API key input field
Click on the "Save" button
Click on the overlay close button
Click on the "Analyze" button
Verify either an AI analysis output section is visible OR a visible error/toast message indicates an API/network failure

title: Auto-Prioritize in Demo mode produces visible AI suggestions
description: Verifies that Auto-Prioritize in Demo mode returns visible suggestions and updates the UI to reflect new priorities (where the UI supports it).

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the API key overlay
Click on the "Demo" tab in the API key overlay
Click on the overlay close button
Click on the "Auto-Prioritize" button
Wait for AI processing to complete (wait for suggestions/prioritization results to appear or update)
Verify an auto-prioritization result or suggestion text is visible
Verify the tasks list shows a visible change consistent with reprioritization (for example, a "Priority" indicator, ordering change, or a "Updated"/"Reprioritized" message)

title: AI Chat: empty message is blocked with visible validation
description: Verifies the chat input cannot send an empty message and provides visible feedback or keeps chat history unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the AI Chat panel
Verify the chat input field is visible
Click on the "Send" button
Verify a visible validation message is shown OR verify no new user message appears in the chat history

title: AI Chat: multiple consecutive messages maintain ordered history
description: Verifies that sending two messages results in two user entries and corresponding assistant replies in the correct order.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the AI Chat panel
Type "Message one: list three focus tips." into the chat input field
Click on the "Send" button
Wait for an assistant reply to appear in the chat history
Type "Message two: now give me one actionable next step." into the chat input field
Click on the "Send" button
Verify text "Message one" is visible in the chat history
Verify text "Message two" is visible in the chat history

title: Closing AI overlay does not block subsequent AI actions
description: Verifies that after opening and closing the API key overlay, AI actions (Analyze) remain clickable and render output.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the control that opens the API key overlay
Click on the overlay close button
Verify the API key overlay is not visible
Click on the "Analyze" button
Wait for AI processing to complete (wait for analysis output area to appear or update)
Verify an AI analysis output section is visible with non-empty content

title: Complete a focus session and see it reflected in local stats and analytics
description: Verifies a user can start a focus timer, complete/stop a session, save it, and see stats updated in the app UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Verify element "Stop" is visible
Click "Stop"
Click "Save Session" if it is visible
Verify text "Session" is visible in the session stats area
Verify text "Analytics" is visible

title: Reset an active timer and confirm no session is added
description: Verifies resetting the timer returns it to the initial value and does not create a saved session.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Click "Reset"
Verify text "25:00" is visible on the timer display
Verify element "Save Session" is not visible
Verify text "Sessions" is visible in the stats/analytics area

title: Prevent starting the timer twice while it is already running
description: Verifies the app blocks a second start attempt and shows a warning when the timer is already running.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Click "Start"
Verify text "Timer already running" is visible
Verify element "Stop" is visible

title: Stop a running timer and confirm it is no longer running
description: Verifies the user can stop the timer and the UI returns to a non-running state.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Verify element "Stop" is visible
Click "Stop"
Verify element "Start" is visible
Verify element "Stop" is not visible

title: Save Session appears only after stopping/ending a run (if the app prompts)
description: Verifies the save prompt is not shown before any run is stopped, and appears only after stopping/ending a run when applicable.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Verify element "Save Session" is not visible
Click "Start"
Click "Stop"
Verify element "Save Session" is visible

title: Session stats increase after saving a session
description: Verifies that saving a stopped session updates visible session totals in the stats/analytics UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Click "Stop"
Click "Save Session" if it is visible
Click on "Analytics" to open the analytics view/panel
Verify text "Focus" is visible in analytics
Verify text "Sessions" is visible in analytics

title: Reset after stopping does not create a session and returns timer to initial value
description: Verifies resetting after a stop returns the timer to its initial value and does not add a session unless explicitly saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on "Focus Timer" to open the Focus Timer panel
Click "Start"
Click "Stop"
Click "Reset"
Verify text "25:00" is visible on the timer display
Verify element "Save Session" is not visible

title: Create a note, save it, and generate a summary
description: Verifies a user can create a note, save it, and see an AI-generated summary displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Type "Meeting notes: Discuss Q2 priorities, deadlines, and owners. Action items: finalize scope, draft timeline, schedule review." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Verify the newly saved note appears in the notes list
Click on "Summarize"
Verify an AI summary output area is visible and contains summary text

title: Saved note persists after page reload
description: Verifies a saved note remains available after reloading the app (local persistence).

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Type "Persistence check note: This note should still be here after a refresh." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Verify the newly saved note appears in the notes list
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Verify the saved note "Persistence check note" is visible in the notes list

title: Extract Tasks from a selected note adds tasks to the task list
description: Verifies Extract Tasks creates task items from a note and they appear in the task list UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Type "Tasks to extract: 1) Email Alex about requirements. 2) Write project brief by Friday. 3) Book kickoff meeting." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Click on the saved note in the notes list to select it
Click on "Extract Tasks"
Verify at least one new extracted task item is visible in the tasks list (e.g., a task containing "Email Alex" or "Write project brief" or "Book kickoff meeting")

title: Extracted tasks persist after reload
description: Verifies tasks created via Extract Tasks remain visible after reloading the app (local persistence).

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Type "Persistent tasks: Buy groceries. Call the bank. Prepare slides." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Click on the saved note in the notes list to select it
Click on "Extract Tasks"
Verify a task containing "Buy groceries" (or "Call the bank" or "Prepare slides") is visible in the tasks list
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Verify a previously extracted task (e.g., "Buy groceries") is visible in the tasks list

title: Summarize on an empty note shows a user-facing validation error
description: Verifies the app prevents summarizing when there is no note content and shows a visible error/help message.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Click on "Summarize"
Verify text indicating a validation problem is visible (e.g., "Please enter note content" or "Note is empty")
Verify no summary output text is displayed

title: Saving an empty note is blocked with validation and does not add a note
description: Verifies Save Note with empty content shows validation and does not create a note in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Click on "Save Note"
Verify text indicating a validation error is visible (e.g., "Note cannot be empty")
Verify no new note is added to the notes list

title: Selecting a note changes the visible note content in the editor/viewer
description: Verifies that clicking different notes in the list loads the corresponding content into the note editor/viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html
Click on the "Notes" panel/tab to open Notes
Click on "New Note"
Type "Note A content: Alpha." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Click on "New Note"
Type "Note B content: Beta." into the note content editor
Click on "Save Note"
Click on the note in the notes list that corresponds to "Note A"
Verify text "Note A content: Alpha." is visible in the note editor/viewer area
Click on the note in the notes list that corresponds to "Note B"
Verify text "Note B content: Beta." is visible in the note editor/viewer area
